chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 77 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 20.01.2016 For Katcha Peshi Mr. Amjad Ali Mangi, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Yasir Tahseen Talpur, State Coiunsel The petitioner is aggrieved by the alleged harassment at the hands of official respondents. Learned State Counsel states that no harassment has been caused to the petitioner. In fact there are number of criminal cases registered against the petitioner and in order to save his skin, he has filed this petition. We have not seen any tangible proof of alleged harassment to the petitioner at the hands of official respondents. In our view registration of FIR against the petitioner does not amount to any harassment. In the circumstances, this petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Karar/-
